description: Responsive image gallery grid with integrated lightbox viewer, loading state, empty state, and optional image deletion via a data provider.

parameters.name: Images
parameters.description: Images to display in the gallery grid.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: When true, shows a loading spinner instead of the grid.

parameters.name: EmptyTitle
parameters.description: Heading for the empty state when Images is empty.

parameters.name: OnImageClick
parameters.description: Fires when an image item is clicked (before lightbox opens).

parameters.name: UrlResolver
parameters.description: Optional URL resolver for full-size images (ticket-based APIs, legacy).

parameters.name: DataProvider
parameters.description: Data provider for secure ticket URLs and delete operations.

parameters.name: CanDelete
parameters.description: When true, shows a delete button in the lightbox.

examples.title: Gallery with loading state and delete support
examples.code: <TmImageGallery Images="@images" IsLoading="@isLoading" CanDelete="true" DataProvider="@galleryProvider" OnImageClick="@HandleImageClick" EmptyTitle="No photos yet" />
